title: The Street Peddler
content: You slide a few folded bills across a sticky bar counter in a crowded Camden dive. The bartender, a man with a map of broken veins on his nose, glances at the photo you've sketched out.||'That one?' he sneers, wiping a glass with a rag that's seen better days. 'He's a bottom-feeder. A small-time street peddler who'd sell his own mother's secrets for a single fix. He's been haunting these alleys for years, pretending he's part of the big game.'||'Sure, he knows every shadow in Camden, and he's got eyes on every back door, but he's a fraud. If he's telling you he's got 'insider info' on a guy like Vane, he's likely just looking for a patsy to clear his own debts.'
